title: Team Manifest
description: Cornice agent orchestrator manifest consumed by Serac (snowmeltio/serac). Written to ~/.claude/teams/<orchestrator-session-id>.json.

version.description: Schema version. Serac rejects manifests with version > MAX_SUPPORTED_VERSION.

sessionId.description: Unique identifier for this Cornice orchestrator instance.

startedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the orchestrator started.

cwd.description: Absolute path to the orchestrator's working directory.

agents.description: All agents spawned by this orchestrator instance.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last manifest write.

sessionId.description: Session identifier. Must be non-empty, max 200 chars, no path traversal characters (/, \\, ..) or null bytes.

exitStatus.description: Terminal exit status. Mapped from Cornice AgentStatus: completed->success, failed->failed, stopped->cancelled.

sessionId.description: Claude Code session ID for this agent. Used by Serac to locate the agent's JSONL transcript.

name.description: Agent display name (derived from task description).

cwd.description: Absolute path to the agent's working directory.

parentSessionId.description: Session ID of the parent (orchestrator session ID for top-level agents).

depth.description: Nesting depth in the agent hierarchy. Minimum 1 for all agents.

spawnedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the agent was spawned.

completedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the agent finished, or null if still running.

exitStatus.description: Terminal status, or null if still running.
